title: <div>Create a quote with an APA in-text citation:  The Purdue Online Writing Lab
content:
Create a quote with an APA in-text citation: The Purdue Online Writing Lab states, “Your essay should include four major sections: the Title Page, Abstract, Main Body, and References” (Purdue Online Writing Lab, pg. 1, 2021).
Paraphrase with an APA in-text citation:
According to the Purdue Online Writing Lab (2021), it is important to remember to include a title page before the abstract, at least three main body paragraphs, and references section.
-OR-
It is important to remember to include a title page before the abstract, at least three main body paragraphs, and references section (Paiz, 2015).

APA formatted Reference: Purdue Online Writing Lab. (n.d.). APA formatting and style guide (7th ed.) Purdue Online Writing Lab.

Complete the assignment for three different sources from the Fortis Online Library (LIRN). You do not need to create a table but do label each item if you complete all parts.
Consider using sources that would be useful in your compare and contrast essay.
Check your work to ensure proper spelling and grammar mechanics.
